title: The Whisper in the Hallway
content: Late one evening, Ben heard what sounded like someone whispering in the hallway outside his room. He listened carefully, but the words were impossible to understand. Feeling nervous, he slowly opened the door. The hallway was empty. The whisper continued until he noticed an open window nearby. The wind was moving through a narrow crack in the door, creating the strange sound. Ben closed the window, and the whisper disappeared immediately. He laughed, relieved that the mystery had such a simple explanation.
